params.manager: Address of the manager to remove

params.vetoed: Whether to veto (true) or unveto (false) the global hooks root

addAuthorizedCaller(address,address).notice: Adds an authorized caller for a strategy

addSecondaryManager(address,address).notice: Adds a secondary manager to a strategyA manager can either be secondary or primary

batchForwardPPS((address[],uint256[],uin.notice: Batch forwards validated PPS updates to multiple strategies

changeGlobalLeavesStatus(bytes32[],bool[.notice: Changes the banned status of global leaves for a specific strategy

changePrimaryManager(address,address).notice: Changes the primary manager of a strategy immediately (only callable by SuperGovernor)A manager can either be secondary or primary

claimUpkeep(uint256).notice: Claims upkeep tokens from the contract

createVault((address,string,string,addre.notice: Creates a new SuperVault trio (SuperVault, SuperVaultStrategy, SuperVaultEscrow)

depositStake(address,uint256).notice: Deposits UP tokens as stake for manager economic security

depositUpkeep(address,uint256).notice: Deposits UP tokens for manager upkeep

executeChangePrimaryManager(address).notice: Executes a previously proposed change to the primary manager after timelock

executeGlobalHooksRootUpdate().notice: Executes a previously proposed global hooks root update after timelock period

executeStrategyHooksRootUpdate(address).notice: Executes a previously proposed strategy hooks root update after timelock period

forwardPPS(address,(address,bool,uint256.notice: Forwards a validated PPS update from a trusted oracle

getCurrentNonce().notice: Returns the current vault creation nonce

getHooksRootUpdateTimelock().notice: Gets the current hooks root update timelock duration

getMainManager(address).notice: Gets the main manager for a strategy

getMaxStaleness(address).notice: Gets the maximum staleness period for a strategy

getMinUpdateInterval(address).notice: Gets the minimum update interval for a strategy

getPPS(address).notice: Gets the current PPS (price-per-share) for a strategy

getPPSVerificationThresholds(address).notice: Gets the PPS verification thresholds for a strategy

getPPSWithStdDev(address).notice: Gets the current PPS and its standard deviation for a strategy

getProposedGlobalHooksRoot().notice: Gets the proposed global hooks root and effective time

getProposedStrategyHooksRoot(address).notice: Gets the proposed strategy hooks root and effective time

getSecondaryManagers(address).notice: Gets all secondary managers for a strategy

getStakeBalance(address).notice: Gets the current stake balance for a manager

getStrategyHooksRoot(address).notice: Gets the hooks Merkle root for a specific strategy

getUpkeepBalance(address).notice: Gets the current upkeep balance for a manager

isGlobalHooksRootActive().notice: Checks if the global hooks root is active (timelock period has passed)

isGlobalHooksRootVetoed().notice: Check if the global hooks root is currently vetoed

isMainManager(address,address).notice: Checks if an address is the main manager for a strategy

isSecondaryManager(address,address).notice: Checks if an address is a secondary manager for a strategy

isStrategyHooksRootVetoed(address).notice: Check if a strategy hooks root is currently vetoed

isStrategyPaused(address).notice: Checks if a strategy is currently paused

proposeChangePrimaryManager(address,addr.notice: Proposes a change to the primary manager (callable by secondary managers)A manager can either be secondary or primary

proposeGlobalHooksRoot(bytes32).notice: Proposes an update to the global hooks Merkle root

proposeStrategyHooksRoot(address,bytes32.notice: Proposes an update to a strategy-specific hooks Merkle root

removeSecondaryManager(address,address).notice: Removes a secondary manager from a strategy

setHooksRootUpdateTimelock(uint256).notice: Sets a new hooks root update timelock duration

slashStake(address,uint256).notice: Slashes a manager's stake balance by a specified amount

updatePPSVerificationThresholds(address,.notice: Updates the PPS verification thresholds for a strategy

validateHook(address,(address,bytes,byte.notice: Validates a hook against both global and strategy-specific Merkle roots

validateHooks(address,(address,bytes,byt.notice: Batch validates multiple hooks against Merkle roots

withdrawUpkeep(uint256).notice: Withdraws UP tokens from manager upkeep balance
